description_long: This object is a futuristic shotgun with a sleek, angular design, predominantly finished in black with striking red accents along its body and grip. The main body is robust and features a thick, rectangular barrel with a metallic sheen, suggesting a reinforced construction. The grip is ergonomically shaped, with a pronounced finger groove and a slightly textured surface for secure handling. The trigger guard is large and rounded, providing ample space for gloved fingers, and the trigger itself is set deep within the guard. The shotgun lacks a traditional stock, instead featuring a compact pistol grip, making it suitable for close-quarters use. Subtle details such as venting along the barrel and a compact muzzle hint at advanced engineering and a modern, tactical aesthetic.
description: A futuristic, black and red shotgun with a compact, angular body, ergonomic pistol grip, and a large rounded trigger guard. The design is robust and tactical, with metallic and textured surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, compact barrel, and the alignment of the body, with red accents visible along the top and bottom edges.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length of the shotgun, the angular body, ergonomic pistol grip, and the large, rounded trigger guard with red highlights.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the top of the body, with the trigger guard and grip profile visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the same angular body, grip, and trigger guard, with red accents along the lower edge.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, rectangular with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded trigger guard with a smooth contour and ample space
